title: Paddy Flynn
extract:
Paddy Flynn (born 11 December 1987) is a former professional rugby league footballer who played as a winger. He played for the Widnes Vikings, and on loan from Widnes at the Castleford Tigers in the Super League. Flynn also played for the Sheffield Eagles and the Rochdale Hornets in the Championship.
Flynn has appeared Outside of sport, Flynn also works part-time as a plumber. His hobbies include playing Clash of Clans, where he represents Yorkshire based CGDL.
